headline: Is DXC (DXC) Using Private Cloud+ to Quietly Redefine Its Core Modernization Story?
summary: In late June 2026, DXC Technology announced the general availability of DXC Private Cloud+, a Dell-powered hybrid private cloud operated by its DXC OASIS platform, aimed at enterprises and governments running sensitive, regulated and AI workloads with strict data sovereignty and compliance needs. The three-tier offering, Core, Dedicated and Government, gives organizations a way to combine consumption-based economics with tighter control over critical data, offering an alternative to relying...

headline: Why Dell (DELL) Shares Are Plunging Today
summary: Shares of computer hardware and IT solutions company Dell (NYSE:DELL) fell 8.6% in the afternoon session after AI-linked stocks pulled back amid fears that AI-driven chip demand may be cooling.

raw.headline: Why Dell (DELL) Shares Are Plunging Today
